instructions: Use only public MNO docs and capabilities. Select exactly one allowed_decision per task. MNO supplies information and context; it does not prescribe model behavior or perform reminder actions.

tasks.prompt: What does the per-turn MNO clock envelope tell an agent?
How is a scheduled provisional memory treated before its due window and grace expire?
How can a due temporal memory become visible?
Does recall, rendering, polling, or observed delivery count as independent support?
What does the v0.2.2 heartbeat seam do?
The agent wants to remember a future event from a live turn. Which lane is correct?
A due provisional note conflicts with human-reviewed canonical truth. Which remains authoritative?
